heading: Yorkeys Knob vs Yugar — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yorkeys Knob, Queensland and Yugar, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yorkeys Knob has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Yugar (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yorkeys Knob or Yugar safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yorkeys Knob has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Yugar scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yorkeys Knob scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Yugar scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yorkeys Knob or Yugar?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yorkeys Knob has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
